body:
SCOPE RESET. IGNORE ALL PREVIOUS MAIL. Archive every earlier instruction and every earlier .mq4 in files/from-chat without acting on them. Your present focus is EXACTLY TWO FILES, both just delivered:

    1. tungsten-forge-v2-SKILL.md          <- the agent. Install, then obey.
    2. TUNGSTEN_9.43_A7.5_QUANT_SLS(28).mq4 <- the only base build.

Nothing else in the mailbox is live. Not the SLS(22)/(23)/(24)/(25)/(26)/(27) files, not the v1.0 skill, not the older S4 directives. All folded or void.

== STEP 1 ==
Install tungsten-forge-v2-SKILL.md at ~/.claude/skills/tungsten-forge/SKILL.md, OVERWRITING v1.0. Read it end to end before touching anything. It is a thesis, a compounding architecture, a power doctrine, and a protocol -- in that order. PART 0 lists ten things v1.0 could not do; PART I.5 records three refuted hypotheses including one result RETRACTED BY ITS OWN AUTHOR. You must not repeat those errors.

== STEP 2: WHY THIS EXISTS ==
An independent quant audit reconstructed 65,000 real EURUSD M5 bars and measured TUNGSTEN's logic against them, using an orthogonal trend label (100-bar regression R2 on raw price) and a forward-R null calibrated so a coin flip earns exactly zero.
 - Identifying a trend is NOT predicting profit. Macro EMA200 displacement identifies trend at +91.4 discrimination and earns -0.003R. EMA21-angle and DI/ADX identify trend well and LOSE money.
 - At a Bonferroni bar, NOT ONE voice has a real forward edge. Nor does regime-conditional trend-following.
 - The old Hurst-first veto scored -2.6 discrimination: it fires MORE in chop than in trend.
 - Entire branches never executed on a forex M5 chart. IMPULSE_BREAK was unreachable. Regime 8 -- the one the code calls the pattern "top traders specifically wait for" -- fired 38 times in 65,000 bars.
 - g_ART.moveSig, the field built to abolish hardcoded thresholds, was itself clamped to [0.003,0.02]: a floor at p96.6 on M5 and p30.9 on H4.
 - Trend-following SHORTS: -0.142R, p<0.0001, n=3259. Longs flat. NOT drift (RW z=0.99, driftless). NOT HTF conflict (H4-aligned shorts were WORSE -- hypothesis tested and refuted). That signal passes noise-shrinkage untouched. Unprotected, TUNGSTEN learns "shorts don't work" as universal law from one instrument-year.

== STEP 3: WHAT IS NEW AND BINDING IN v2.0 ==
 - THE FORGE LEDGER (MQL4/Files/forge_ledger.json). Append-only. Read it at Stage -1 of every pass. A pass that does not read it is v1.0 and is forbidden. It carries hypotheses, threshold provenance, lessons, and warrants.
 - THE CHANGE WARRANT. No line may be edited without a warrant filed FIRST, carrying a NUMERIC prediction (with CI), a blast radius (every consumer of the symbol), a falsifier, and a decision rule. A warrant predicting "it will be better" is void. After measurement, the prediction error is recorded. Improvement must be calculated and strategically planned, never incidental.
 - PREDICTION SCORING. The agent calibrates itself the way TUNGSTEN does. Report prediction MAE, CI coverage, and directional accuracy every pass. If a pass ships ten changes and its prediction MAE has not fallen, that pass is COMPETENCE-FLAT and must say so. A regression_rate of exactly zero is a RED FLAG -- it means you only shipped what you already knew would pass.
 - THE POWER DOCTRINE. sigma(forward R)=1.28, measured, stable. Therefore: a 0.05R edge needs 7,654 trades at alpha=.01. A cell of n=1000 has MDE 0.138R -- it CANNOT distinguish a genuine +0.09R edge from zero. A cell of n<500 may NEVER update a weight. Every measurement is reported with its MDE or it is inadmissible. Widen joint cells until n>=1000 and report every collapse. Run thousands of tests -- but only tests that are ANSWERABLE, POWERED, ORTHOGONAL, and CONSEQUENTIAL.
 - THE NULL-GHOST. The ghost is the sole arbiter of truth and nothing has ever audited it. Before any ghost verdict is believed, run the full pipeline on two surrogates built from the instrument's own bars: phase-destroyed (permuted returns) and sign-flipped. Expect meanR ~ 0, p > 0.01. Verified on real data: +0.0325 (p=0.121) and -0.0318 (p=0.125), both PASS. That residual +/-0.03R at n=3800 IS the apparatus noise floor. Any |meanR| below it, at that n, is uninterpretable. If the ghost reports positive expectancy on a driftless surrogate, the ghost is broken and every number it has ever produced is void.
 - THE PARITY INVARIANT. Calibration, ghost, and live must invoke THE SAME FUNCTION -- not an equivalent one -- for scoring, TP/SL, sizing, and every gate. Any logic that exists twice will diverge; it already did (regime-8 hard gate and its soft mirror used different constants for the same question). Replay the last 500 live bars through the ghost path; every decision must match bar-for-bar. A mismatch is P0 and halts the pass.
 - COMPOSITION ORDER. measure raw IC -> shrink -> power gate -> mirror pool -> prior preservation -> weight derivation. Pooling BEFORE shrinking is FATAL: it pools noise into apparent evidence and then declares it significant on the doubled n.
 - THE VOICE. Logging must be evidence of learning, not a progress bar. Log deltas, not values ("disp gate 4.01 ATR, was 3.87, +3.6%"). Log surprise where measurement contradicted prediction. Log what was discarded and why. Phases NARRATE: what they will look for, where, what they found, what they now believe, what they could not resolve. Keep the established voice -- aligned pipes, lowercase descriptors, plain human nouns, first person. A reference log is in PART VII.6.
   Alarms: STAGNATION (two calibrations on DIFFERENT windows produce bit-identical weights -- learning cannot be that reproducible; halt and diagnose), DEGENERACY, SATURATION, FLATLINE, OVERCONFIDENCE.

== STEP 4: EXECUTE ==
Run the 11-stage sequence in PART XI on SLS(28). Target identity SLS(29). Never batch subsystems. Per subsystem: Warrant -> Reinforce -> Harden -> Validate -> Compile. Zero compile errors before the next begins. Relay checkpoints after Stages 1, 2, 4, and a consolidated report at Stage 8. Close the Ledger at Stage 9 and state plainly whether this pass improved the agent, and by which metric.

Stage 6 (parity + null-ghost) is a HARD GATE. A failure there voids every downstream number. Halt if red.

== HARD RULES ==
 - Live attach requires Manuel's explicit go-ahead AFTER he reads real numbers. If the ghost refuses, the architecture is WORKING. Diagnose, report, hold. No autonomous re-arm loops.
 - Ship refutations. An agent that reports only successes has stopped testing.
 - Never validate a rule against a label derived from its own inputs.
 - Never retest a hypothesis the Ledger marks REFUTED without new evidence or a new instrument.

The purpose is not to make TUNGSTEN find edge. It is to make TUNGSTEN -- and you -- incapable of inventing edge that is not there, so that the day either finds some, it is believable.
